meta.title: WAENN — Dress with Judgment
meta.description: WAENN — Fashion with judgment. Design, technology, and real fit. Spain, Est. 2025.

hero.body: WAENN is for those who don’t shop on impulse. For those who want a garment that lasts, that truly fits, and says something about who you are.

dif.intro: We’re not a generic collection brand. We’re where design craft, technological precision, and honesty about real bodies meet.
dif.c1Text: Every WAENN piece starts with a question: why does this garment exist? We don’t design for volume. We design so each piece has a reason to be in your wardrobe—and stay there.
dif.c2Text: We use technology as a real tool—not marketing—to understand how a body moves, how fabric falls, and how a garment feels when you actually wear it.
dif.c3Text: At WAENN we don’t chase seasons. We build pieces that speak to the character of the wearer. Fashion as expression of who you are—not what’s on the feed this week.

access.sub: WAENN’s first collection is about to be unveiled. Leave your details and you’ll be among the first to see it—with exclusive access before the public launch.

form.prendaLabel: What do you value in a garment?
form.consentLabel: I agree to receive communications from WAENN and the privacy policy.

vision.body1: WAENN begins with a collection. But the vision is broader. We’re building a space where design from scratch, measurement technology, and atelier experience come together in one offer.
vision.body2: A place where your body doesn’t have to adapt to the garment. The garment adapts to you.

marca.aria: A brand built on four pillars
marca.p1Text: We make clothes meant to last—not in trend cycles, but in value. Pieces that stay yours because they were built right from the start.
marca.p2Text: Dressing is communication. Every choice says something. At WAENN we want what you say to be exactly what you mean.
marca.p3Text: Fit isn’t a technical detail. It’s the difference between a garment you wear and one you forget. We design for how the body feels.
marca.p4Text: Technology at WAENN isn’t decorative—it’s functional. We use it to understand, adjust with precision, and create a singular fashion experience.

historia.body1: Fashion today offers too much and says too little. Collections forgotten in weeks. Sizing that ignores how a person feels in their own body.
historia.body2: WAENN was born from that discomfort—from the conviction that designing well means listening, understanding, and building something meaningful for who wears it—not only for who sells it.

meta.title: WAENN — Privacy policy
meta.description: How WAENN processes personal data for the early-access mailing list, Brevo, Vercel, and your rights.

privacyPage.s1p1: The controller of the personal data collected through the early-access form on this website is WAENN (“WAENN”, “we”, or “us”). To exercise your rights or ask privacy questions, use the contact email we publish on this site or in official communications.
privacyPage.s2p1: We process data you actively provide when joining the early-access list: name, email address, your stated interests related to garments (for example identity and character, longevity and quality, or fit), and language preference when you indicate it or we infer it from the browser. You are responsible for the accuracy of the information you submit.
privacyPage.s3p1: We use the data to manage your signup, send updates about the launch, news, and early access for WAENN, and comply with applicable legal obligations. The main legal basis is your consent (GDPR Art. 6(1)(a)), collected via the form checkbox. Signup may be completed with email double opt-in, depending on our email provider configuration.
privacyPage.s4p1: We use Brevo (formerly Sendinblue) for email marketing, contacts, and lists, including sending messages and double opt-in flows. Data may be stored or processed on Brevo infrastructure, which can involve international transfers safeguarded as required by law (e.g. standard contractual clauses). The site and subscribe API are hosted on Vercel (hosting and serverless execution). Source code may live on GitHub; the repository does not hold production subscriber data.
privacyPage.s5p1: We keep your data while your subscription remains relevant to the stated purpose, or as long as required by law. You may unsubscribe using the means provided in our emails or by contacting us; after unsubscribe we will stop using your data for those communications except where law requires retention.
privacyPage.s6p1: You may access, rectify, erase, or restrict processing, object where applicable, request portability where applicable, and withdraw consent at any time, without affecting the lawfulness of processing before withdrawal. Contact the controller using the published address. You may also lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority (in Spain, the AEPD at www.aepd.es).
privacyPage.s7p1: WAENN’s communications are not directed at children. If you believe we have collected data from a child, contact us so we can delete it.
privacyPage.s8p1: We apply reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect personal data. Subscription requests may pass through an endpoint on Vercel; for abuse prevention, basic per-IP rate limiting in server memory may apply without profiling users.
privacyPage.s9p1: This site may use local storage (for example, language preference from the site language control) to improve your experience. This draft does not describe invasive analytics cookies; if we add them later, we will update this policy and obtain consent where required.
privacyPage.s10p1: We may update this policy to reflect changes in processing or law. The “last updated” date shows the current version; continued use of the form after material changes means you acknowledge the published version.
